summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo Junior Dashboard (Jeune Samouraï mode) after refactoring. All requested features verified: Login flow, JourneyPath with 6 steps, 8 navigation blocks, Maître Tanaka intro dialog, 7 Virtues section with progress bars, Daily Challenges section. Navigation from dashboard blocks to corresponding sections works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPath component correctly implements 6 steps with proper progression UI (locked/unlocked states)
JuniorDashboard properly integrates JourneyPath, UserDashboardBlocks, DailyChallengeWidget, and 7 Virtues
Maître Tanaka intro dialog correctly appears on first visit and stores user's name in localStorage
All 8 navigation blocks have proper data-testid attributes for testing
7 Virtues section displays all virtues with kanji, progress bars, and expandable details
Daily challenges section shows 'Défi du jour' and 'Mini-défis du Budo' with XP rewards
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Junior Dashboard (Jeune Samouraï mode) fully tested. All 6 JourneyPath steps display correctly with locked/unlocked states. 8 navigation blocks work and navigate to correct pages. 7 Virtues section shows all virtues with progress bars. Maître Tanaka intro dialog appears on first visit. Daily challenges section displays correctly.

features_verified.journey_path_6_steps: PASS - All 6 steps visible: Mon Profil, Mes Techniques, Dojo Virtuel, Ma Pratique, Ma Progression, Mes Trophées
features_verified.journey_path_progression_ui: PASS - Shows '0 / 6 étapes' with progress bar and step indicators
features_verified.journey_path_step_dialog: PASS - Clicking step opens dialog with Tanaka message, description, tips, and 'Commencer!' button
features_verified.journey_path_locked_steps: PASS - Steps 2-6 show lock icon and 'Termine l'étape X' message
features_verified.navigation_blocks_8: PASS - All 8 blocks found: Techniques, Dojo Virtuel, Ma Pratique, Ma Progression, Les 7 Vertus, Les Ceintures, Trophées, Cette semaine
features_verified.navigation_to_techniques: PASS - Clicking Techniques block navigates to /fr/aikido/techniques
features_verified.maitre_tanaka_intro_dialog: PASS - Dialog appears on first visit with welcome message and name input
features_verified.maitre_tanaka_floating_button: PASS - 'Parle-moi !' button visible in bottom right corner
features_verified.daily_challenges_section: PASS - 'Défi du jour' with Exploration challenge and 'Mini-défis du Budo' with 6 challenges
features_verified.virtues_section_7: PASS - All 7 virtues displayed: Respect, Courage, Maîtrise, Humilité, Bienveillance, Attention, Responsabilité
features_verified.virtues_with_kanji: PASS - Each virtue shows kanji character (礼, 勇, 克, 謙, 仁, 注, 責)
features_verified.virtues_progress_bars: PASS - Each virtue has progress bar showing 0%
features_verified.virtues_expandable: PASS - Clicking virtue expands to show 'Défis disponibles'
